new_classes.definition_en: A non-alcoholic beverage ready for consumption based on skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk to which refined vegetable fats (obtained from products of CN headings 0401 to 0404) have been added, commercially known as 'filled milk'; classified under CN subheading 22029995.
A quality or ingredient basis derived from skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk, used as the primary constituent of filled milk beverages classified under CN subheading 22029995.

A quality representing the addition of fats obtained from products of CN headings 0401 to 0404 (dairy headings), used to discriminate the filled milk subheadings 22029991–22029999 from other non-alcoholic beverages in heading 2202.

new_properties.label_en: dairy fat content percent by weight

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the key discriminating criteria for CN 22029995: (1) the product is a non-alcoholic beverage (subclass of NonAlcoholicBeverage), (2) it is a 'filled milk' ready for direct consumption, (3) it is based on skimmed milk or powdered skimmed milk (SkimmedMilkBase), and (4) it contains fat derived from dairy products of headings 0401–0404 (DairyDerivedFatAddition). The property dairyFatContentPercent allows encoding of fat percentage by weight. Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the legal text is truncated and likely specifies fat content thresholds (e.g. specific percentage ranges that distinguish 22029991, 22029993, 22029995, 22029999 from each other) which cannot be captured without the complete text; (b) the exact nature of 'refined vegetable fats' replacing dairy fat is hinted at but not fully articulated in the available text snippet. The fat-percentage thresholds separating sibling codes within 22029991–22029999 could not be modelled due to the truncated source text.
